---
title: "References — Trauma biomarkers"
---

Domain-specific reading list on trauma biomarkers: discovery, validation, clinical utility.

::: {.callout-warning}
## TODO_FILL_BEFORE_DEPLOY

Awaiting curated, DOI-verified reading list. PubMed search and editorial selection required — citation integrity rules out hallucinated entries.

Suggested coverage areas to assemble:

- Acute-phase proteins and trauma severity
- Cytokine signatures and trauma-induced coagulopathy
- Endotheliopathy of trauma (syndecan-1, thrombomodulin, etc.)
- Multi-omics biomarker discovery in polytrauma
- Reporting standards for biomarker studies (REMARK, STARD)
:::
